inputs.label: core.app.Welcome Text
inputs.value: Hi, I am your HR recruiting assistant. Choose a workflow to draft a JD, screen a resume, create interview questions, or write candidate outreach.

nodes.name: Recruiting workflow menu
nodes.intro: 该模块可配置多个选项，以供对话时选择。不同选项可导向不同工作流支线

inputs.label: app:workflow.select_description
inputs.value: What would you like to create?

nodes.name: JD drafting input
nodes.intro: 该模块可以配置多种输入，引导用户输入特定内容。

inputs.label: app:workflow.select_description
inputs.value: Provide the role basics for the job description.

value.label: Team context
value.description: Hiring team, reporting line, product area, or business context.

outputs.label: workflow:form_input_result
outputs.description: A complete object containing all submitted form values

inputs.label: common:core.ai.Prompt

outputs.label: common:core.module.output.label.New context
outputs.description: 将本次回复内容拼接上历史记录，作为新的上下文返回

outputs.label: common:core.module.output.label.Ai response content
outputs.description: 将在 stream 回复完毕后触发

nodes.name: Resume screening input
nodes.intro: 该模块可以配置多种输入，引导用户输入特定内容。

inputs.label: app:workflow.select_description
inputs.value: Paste the job requirements and candidate resume for screening.

value.label: Screening priority
value.description: For example: technical depth, leadership, domain fit, salary risk.

outputs.label: workflow:form_input_result
outputs.description: A complete object containing all submitted form values

inputs.label: common:core.ai.Prompt
inputs.value:
You are an HR resume screening assistant. Base your assessment only on the pasted job requirements and resume. Do not infer protected characteristics or make unsupported claims.

Job requirements: {{$FORM_RESUME.job_requirements$}}
Resume text: {{$FORM_RESUME.resume_text$}}
Screening priority: {{$FORM_RESUME.screening_priority$}}

Return:
1. Overall fit: Strong / Possible / Weak
2. Evidence-backed match summary
3. Must-have requirement coverage table
4. Strengths
5. Gaps or concerns
6. Suggested recruiter follow-up questions
7. Recommendation for next step
Use cautious language where evidence is missing.

outputs.label: common:core.module.output.label.New context
outputs.description: 将本次回复内容拼接上历史记录，作为新的上下文返回

outputs.label: common:core.module.output.label.Ai response content
outputs.description: 将在 stream 回复完毕后触发
